signals.headline: SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Resolved, Driving XRP Surge Above $1
signals.raw:
SEC Lawsuit Against Ripple Resolved, Driving XRP Surge Above $1.50 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The SEC has dropped its long-running lawsuit against Ripple Labs, a key resolution removing major regulatory uncertainty and fueling XRP's 10% April 2026 rally from ~$1.20 to above $1.50 (now ~$1.42-$1.43).[1][2]
